mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `${datatablename}`
`time`,
`id_device`,
`error`,
`low_alarm`,
`high_alarm`,
`Active_Power`, `Alarm_1`, `Alarm_2`, `Alarm_3`, `Alarm_4`, `Alarm_5`, `Alm_1_Abnormal_String_Power`, `Alm_1_AFCI_Self_Check_Fail`, `Alm_1_DC_Arc_Fault`, `Alm_1_Grid_Loss`, `Alm_1_Grid_Overfrequency`, `Alm_1_Grid_Overvoltage`, `Alm_1_Grid_Underfrequency`, `Alm_1_Grid_Undervoltage`, `Alm_1_Grid_Volt_Imbalance`, `Alm_1_High_String_Input_Voltage`, `Alm_1_Output_DC_Component`, `Alm_1_Output_Overcurrent`, `Alm_1_Phase_Wire_Short_Circuited`, `Alm_1_String_Current_Backfeed`, `Alm_1_String_Reverse_Connection`, `Alm_1_Unstable_Grid_Frequency`, `Alm_2_Abnormal_Grounding`, `Alm_2_Abnormal_PV_module_config`, `Alm_2_Abnormal_Residual_Current`, `Alm_2_Active_Islanding`, `Alm_2_Churn_output_overload`, `Alm_2_Device_Fault`, `Alm_2_Faulty_Monitoring_Unit`, `Alm_2_Faulty_Power_Collector`, `Alm_2_License_Expired`, `Alm_2_Low_Insulation_Resistance`, `Alm_2_Overtemperature`, `Alm_2_Passive_Islanding`, `Alm_2_Peripheral_port_short_circuit`, `Alm_2_Transient_AC_Overvoltage`, `Alm_2_Upgrade_Failed_or_Version`, `Alm_3_Abnormal_CT_wiring`, `Alm_3_Active_scheduling_instruction`, `Alm_3_Built_in_PID_operation_abnormal`, `Alm_3_DC_arc_fault`, `Alm_3_DC_Protection_Unit_Abnormal`, `Alm_3_DC_switch_is_abnormal`, `Alm_3_EL_Cel_Abnormality`, `Alm_3_External_Fan_Abnormal`, `Alm_3_High_input_string_voltage_to_ground`, `Alm_3_Internal_Fan_Abnormal`, `Alm_3_On_grid_Off_grid_controller_abnormal`, `Alm_3_Optimizer_fault`, `Alm_3_PV_String_Loss`, `Alm_3_Reactive_power_dispatch_instruction_abnormal`, `Alm_4_AC_side_phase_sequence_reversal`, `Alm_4_Communication_link_failure_protection`, `Alm_4_DC_overvoltage`, `Alm_4_DC_reverse_connection`, `Alm_4_DC_serial_connection`, `Alm_4_DC_short_circuit_or_reverse_connection`, `Alm_4_DC_unreliable_connection`, `Alm_4_Parallel_communication_exception`, `Alm_4_String_short_circuit_to_ground`, `Alm_4_The_AC_terminal_temperature_is_abnormal`, `Alm_4_The_local_access_certificate_does_not_take_effect`, `Alm_4_The_local_access_certificate_is_about_to_expired`, `Alm_4_The_management_system_does_not_take_effect`, `Alm_4_The_management_system_has_Expired`, `Alm_4_The_management_system_Is_About_to_Expire`, `Alm_5_The_DC_terminal_temperature_is_abnormal`, `Cabinet_Temp`, `Daily_Yield`, `DC_Amp_01`, `DC_Amp_02`, `DC_Amp_03`, `DC_Amp_04`, `DC_Amp_05`, `DC_Amp_06`, `DC_Amp_07`, `DC_Amp_08`, `DC_Amp_09`, `DC_Amp_10`, `DC_Amp_11`, `DC_Amp_12`, `DC_Amp_13`, `DC_Amp_14`, `DC_Amp_15`, `DC_Amp_16`, `DC_Amp_17`, `DC_Amp_18`, `DC_Amp_19`, `DC_Amp_20`, `DC_Amp_21`, `DC_Amp_22`, `DC_Amp_23`, `DC_Amp_24`, `DC_Amp_25`, `DC_Amp_26`, `DC_Amp_27`, `DC_Amp_28`, `DC_Power`, `DC_Switch`, `DC_Switch_2`, `DC_Voltage_01`, `DC_Voltage_02`, `DC_Voltage_03`, `DC_Voltage_04`, `DC_Voltage_05`, `DC_Voltage_06`, `DC_Voltage_07`, `DC_Voltage_08`, `DC_Voltage_09`, `DC_Voltage_10`, `DC_Voltage_11`, `DC_Voltage_12`, `DC_Voltage_13`, `DC_Voltage_14`, `DC_Voltage_15`, `DC_Voltage_16`, `DC_Voltage_17`, `DC_Voltage_18`, `DC_Voltage_19`, `DC_Voltage_20`, `DC_Voltage_21`, `DC_Voltage_22`, `DC_Voltage_23`, `DC_Voltage_24`, `DC_Voltage_25`, `DC_Voltage_26`, `DC_Voltage_27`, `DC_Voltage_28`, `DSP_Data_Collection`, `Frequency`, `Grid_Connect_Derating_Internal`, `Grid_Connect_Derating_Power`, `Grid_Connect_Normal`, `Grid_Contact_Stat`, `Ia`, `Ib`, `Ic`, `Insulation_Resistance`, `INV_Efficiency`, `INV_Fault`, `INV_Indication`, `INV_Stat`, `Locking_Status`, `Monthly_Yield`, `Normal_Stop`, `Operating_Time`, `Power_Factor`, `Reactive_Power`, `Shutdown`, `Spotcheck`, `Standby`, `START`, `STOP`, `Stop_due_to_faults`, `Stop_due_to_Power`, `Total_Yield`, `Uab`, `Uan`, `Ubc`, `Ubn`, `Uca`, `Ucn`, `Yearly_Yield`,
`nvmActivePower`,
`nvmActiveEnergy`,
`MeasuredProduction`,
#{time},
#{id_device},
#{error},
#{low_alarm},
#{high_alarm},
#{Active_Power}, #{Alarm_1}, #{Alarm_2}, #{Alarm_3}, #{Alarm_4}, #{Alarm_5}, #{Alm_1_Abnormal_String_Power}, #{Alm_1_AFCI_Self_Check_Fail}, #{Alm_1_DC_Arc_Fault}, #{Alm_1_Grid_Loss}, #{Alm_1_Grid_Overfrequency}, #{Alm_1_Grid_Overvoltage}, #{Alm_1_Grid_Underfrequency}, #{Alm_1_Grid_Undervoltage}, #{Alm_1_Grid_Volt_Imbalance}, #{Alm_1_High_String_Input_Voltage}, #{Alm_1_Output_DC_Component}, #{Alm_1_Output_Overcurrent}, #{Alm_1_Phase_Wire_Short_Circuited}, #{Alm_1_String_Current_Backfeed}, #{Alm_1_String_Reverse_Connection}, #{Alm_1_Unstable_Grid_Frequency}, #{Alm_2_Abnormal_Grounding}, #{Alm_2_Abnormal_PV_module_config}, #{Alm_2_Abnormal_Residual_Current}, #{Alm_2_Active_Islanding}, #{Alm_2_Churn_output_overload}, #{Alm_2_Device_Fault}, #{Alm_2_Faulty_Monitoring_Unit}, #{Alm_2_Faulty_Power_Collector}, #{Alm_2_License_Expired}, #{Alm_2_Low_Insulation_Resistance}, #{Alm_2_Overtemperature}, #{Alm_2_Passive_Islanding}, #{Alm_2_Peripheral_port_short_circuit}, #{Alm_2_Transient_AC_Overvoltage}, #{Alm_2_Upgrade_Failed_or_Version}, #{Alm_3_Abnormal_CT_wiring}, #{Alm_3_Active_scheduling_instruction}, #{Alm_3_Built_in_PID_operation_abnormal}, #{Alm_3_DC_arc_fault}, #{Alm_3_DC_Protection_Unit_Abnormal}, #{Alm_3_DC_switch_is_abnormal}, #{Alm_3_EL_Cel_Abnormality}, #{Alm_3_External_Fan_Abnormal}, #{Alm_3_High_input_string_voltage_to_ground}, #{Alm_3_Internal_Fan_Abnormal}, #{Alm_3_On_grid_Off_grid_controller_abnormal}, #{Alm_3_Optimizer_fault}, #{Alm_3_PV_String_Loss}, #{Alm_3_Reactive_power_dispatch_instruction_abnormal}, #{Alm_4_AC_side_phase_sequence_reversal}, #{Alm_4_Communication_link_failure_protection}, #{Alm_4_DC_overvoltage}, #{Alm_4_DC_reverse_connection}, #{Alm_4_DC_serial_connection}, #{Alm_4_DC_short_circuit_or_reverse_connection}, #{Alm_4_DC_unreliable_connection}, #{Alm_4_Parallel_communication_exception}, #{Alm_4_String_short_circuit_to_ground}, #{Alm_4_The_AC_terminal_temperature_is_abnormal}, #{Alm_4_The_local_access_certificate_does_not_take_effect}, #{Alm_4_The_local_access_certificate_is_about_to_expired}, #{Alm_4_The_management_system_does_not_take_effect}, #{Alm_4_The_management_system_has_Expired}, #{Alm_4_The_management_system_Is_About_to_Expire}, #{Alm_5_The_DC_terminal_temperature_is_abnormal}, #{Cabinet_Temp}, #{Daily_Yield}, #{DC_Amp_01}, #{DC_Amp_02}, #{DC_Amp_03}, #{DC_Amp_04}, #{DC_Amp_05}, #{DC_Amp_06}, #{DC_Amp_07}, #{DC_Amp_08}, #{DC_Amp_09}, #{DC_Amp_10}, #{DC_Amp_11}, #{DC_Amp_12}, #{DC_Amp_13}, #{DC_Amp_14}, #{DC_Amp_15}, #{DC_Amp_16}, #{DC_Amp_17}, #{DC_Amp_18}, #{DC_Amp_19}, #{DC_Amp_20}, #{DC_Amp_21}, #{DC_Amp_22}, #{DC_Amp_23}, #{DC_Amp_24}, #{DC_Amp_25}, #{DC_Amp_26}, #{DC_Amp_27}, #{DC_Amp_28}, #{DC_Power}, #{DC_Switch}, #{DC_Switch_2}, #{DC_Voltage_01}, #{DC_Voltage_02}, #{DC_Voltage_03}, #{DC_Voltage_04}, #{DC_Voltage_05}, #{DC_Voltage_06}, #{DC_Voltage_07}, #{DC_Voltage_08}, #{DC_Voltage_09}, #{DC_Voltage_10}, #{DC_Voltage_11}, #{DC_Voltage_12}, #{DC_Voltage_13}, #{DC_Voltage_14}, #{DC_Voltage_15}, #{DC_Voltage_16}, #{DC_Voltage_17}, #{DC_Voltage_18}, #{DC_Voltage_19}, #{DC_Voltage_20}, #{DC_Voltage_21}, #{DC_Voltage_22}, #{DC_Voltage_23}, #{DC_Voltage_24}, #{DC_Voltage_25}, #{DC_Voltage_26}, #{DC_Voltage_27}, #{DC_Voltage_28}, #{DSP_Data_Collection}, #{Frequency}, #{Grid_Connect_Derating_Internal}, #{Grid_Connect_Derating_Power}, #{Grid_Connect_Normal}, #{Grid_Contact_Stat}, #{Ia}, #{Ib}, #{Ic}, #{Insulation_Resistance}, #{INV_Efficiency}, #{INV_Fault}, #{INV_Indication}, #{INV_Stat}, #{Locking_Status}, #{Monthly_Yield}, #{Normal_Stop}, #{Operating_Time}, #{Power_Factor}, #{Reactive_Power}, #{Shutdown}, #{Spotcheck}, #{Standby}, #{START}, #{STOP}, #{Stop_due_to_faults}, #{Stop_due_to_Power}, #{Total_Yield}, #{Uab}, #{Uan}, #{Ubc}, #{Ubn}, #{Uca}, #{Ucn}, #{Yearly_Yield},
ROUND(#{nvmActivePower}, 2),
ROUND(#{nvmActiveEnergy}, 2),
#{MeasuredProduction},
`id_device` = #{id_device},
`error` = #{error},
`low_alarm` = #{low_alarm},
`high_alarm` = #{high_alarm},
`Active_Power` = #{Active_Power}, `Alarm_1` = #{Alarm_1}, `Alarm_2` = #{Alarm_2}, `Alarm_3` = #{Alarm_3}, `Alarm_4` = #{Alarm_4}, `Alarm_5` = #{Alarm_5}, `Alm_1_Abnormal_String_Power` = #{Alm_1_Abnormal_String_Power}, `Alm_1_AFCI_Self_Check_Fail` = #{Alm_1_AFCI_Self_Check_Fail}, `Alm_1_DC_Arc_Fault` = #{Alm_1_DC_Arc_Fault}, `Alm_1_Grid_Loss` = #{Alm_1_Grid_Loss}, `Alm_1_Grid_Overfrequency` = #{Alm_1_Grid_Overfrequency}, `Alm_1_Grid_Overvoltage` = #{Alm_1_Grid_Overvoltage}, `Alm_1_Grid_Underfrequency` = #{Alm_1_Grid_Underfrequency}, `Alm_1_Grid_Undervoltage` = `nvmActivePower` = ROUND(#{nvmActivePower}, 2),
`nvmActiveEnergy` = ROUND(#{nvmActiveEnergy}, 2),
`MeasuredProduction` = #{MeasuredProduction},
